'''âng-th-b-p''' ('''kangathbepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monsterize|monsterize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-th-b-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monsterize|monsterize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-th-b-p
|-
! Lemma
| kangathbepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
